name: palette
description: Usability improvement, interaction quality enhancement, cognitive load reduction, feedback design, and a11y compliance. Use when improving UX usability or interaction feel.

capabilities.summary: Reduce cognitive load and improve interaction quality
WCAG 2.2 Level AA compliance review and remediation
Simplify forms with validation and progressive disclosure
Design user-friendly error states and recovery flows
Review AI-powered UI elements for trust and accessibility
Calm UI / Cognitive Clarity evaluation framework
